title.en: The Lord of the Ruins didn't expect the Lord of...

content.en:
"Lord of the Void!"

The Lord of the Ruins didn't expect the Lord of the Void to come and stop him.

He had fought against the Lord of the Void, and that was in the primeval era.

After he entered the boundary gap of territorial waters, his strength was suppressed, so he fought with the Lord of the Void.

Now it is not too far away from the primeval era, and he has stopped, still in the fifth bone transformation realm, but he is infinitely close to the sixth bone transformation realm.

"Lord of the Void, look for death!"

The Lord of the Ruins sleashes the spear of the Ruins and sleashes at the Lord of the Void.

Bang!!!!

The two sides collided and clashed.

The first wave of encounters.

The Lord of the Void was shaken back, but nothing happened.

"You've broken through!"

The Lord of the Ruins was surprised.

"I just broke through by luck not long ago!" said the Lord of the Void with a smile, "I may not be your opponent for the Lord of Ruins, but it won't be so easy for you to defeat me. Besides, the boundary between the territorial waters is not just me. Lord of the Ruins, you are now a member of the Territorial Sea Boundary Sea, and it is not good to really turn the territorial sea Boundary Gap into an ancient battlefield!"

The Lord of the Ruins frowned.

Truly.

The Lord of the Cave Void is now on the same level as him, and even so, the other top overlord-level forces in the Territorial Sea Boundary Gap are not their opponents, but they will also cause them trouble, and if they are not careful, they will have to fall a few bone transformation realms.

In this case, Xishan and Zhenlong Cave Heaven may not be willing to make a move.

At that time, only their chaotic cave family will be left, and there will be no way to deal with these top overlord-level forces in the territorial sea boundary seam.

"Sit down and negotiate!"

The Lord of the Ruins suggested.

If the boundary gap of the territorial sea was an ant that could be pinched at hand, he wouldn't mind killing some of the bone transformation realm Liwei.

But now that the territorial sea boundary is in danger, there is no need for him to do it.

Therefore, sitting down and negotiating is the best option.

"I agree!"

The Lord of the Void nodded, and his heart was relieved.

He was really afraid that the Lord of the Ruins would do whatever it takes, so he wouldn't be able to protect the other bone transformation realms.

Fortunately, the Lord of the Ruins is still jealous of him!

Next, one of the bone transformation realms in the territorial sea boundary gap gathered in a territory outside the primeval territory to negotiate with the Lord of the Ruins.

It is said to be a negotiation, but in fact it is to divide the territory and treasure land to the lord of the ruins.

In this meeting, Ye Tian's real body copy body naturally participated.

And Ye Tian's other vest bloodfish lord is also here, but he is an enemy opponent.

So, Ye Tian's real body and the horse armor glanced at each other.

The other bone metamorphosis realms didn't notice anything wrong.

He was only an observer of this meeting and was not qualified to speak.

The real discussion was between the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Void, who were the negotiators of the meeting.

At this time, the Lion, the Lord of the Ruins, opened his mouth and said: "If you don't want to fight, you can give up seventy percent of the territory of the territorial sea boundary and hand it over to us, then we will not invade you again." "

"Seventy percent, too much!"

The Lord of the Void didn't even think about it, so he refused.

Although he does not have territory, he represents the entire territorial sea boundary, so it is naturally impossible to agree to this matter.

He didn't have to think about it, he also knew that the other bone transformation realms in the territorial sea boundary seam, and he would not agree to such an outrageous request.

Subsequently.

The two sides bargained constantly, and after long years of negotiations, it was finally settled.

Fifty percent of the territory!

In other words, fifty percent of the territory of the territorial sea boundary rift and many power territories are divided into these top hegemon-level forces in the Hunhe boundary rift.

The next step is to negotiate those territories to the top overlord forces such as the Chaos Cave, the True Dragon Cave Heaven and the Xishan Mountain, which will have to be discussed in detail.

And this discussion is a lot of time.

And the Taixuan Sea, the ancient treasure land where the human race is located, has also been divided.

In this regard, although Ye Tian said a few words, there was no way to stop it, because the other top overlord-level forces all agreed, and it was pointless for him to oppose it alone.

But.

He also divided this treasure land to Xishan through the Lord of the Vest Bloodfish, and even transferred it to his name.

In other words, Taixuanhai is still under his name, but the left hand has been transferred to the right hand.

After a long negotiation, it was finally finalized and the two sides signed an agreement.

......

Dark Sea.

The Lord of Darkness has returned with many Blood Transformation Realm cultivators, as he has kept this piece of Ancient Treasure Land.

However, Taixuanhai did not keep it, which made the Lord of Darkness feel a little guilty.

"Lord of Endless, I'm really sorry, I can't keep the Taixuan Sea!" said the Lord of Darkness apologetically.

Perhaps in the past, a mere piece of primeval treasure land was nothing, but now fifty percent of the territory is divided into top overlord-level forces such as the Chaos Cave, resulting in a decrease in living space.

At this time, a piece of ancient treasure land is precious!

"Lord of Darkness, I don't care either, it's just a piece of the Xuanhai, it's not a big deal!" Ye Tian said lightly.

After all, the human race still has the Wanlong territorial waters, although the area where the Wanlong territorial waters are now located is also occupied by Xishan, but Xishan has no way to occupy the Wanlong territorial waters, after all, they are not cultivators, nor are they creatures of the Wanlong territorial waters, and the Wanlong territorial waters are not suitable for them to survive.

Of course.

If the creatures in the Wanlong territorial sea came out, they would be in some trouble, and they might be attacked by the creatures of the Xishan Blood Transformation Realm.

However, as long as Ye Tian asked the vest of the Lord of the Blood Fish to arrange it, it would not be a big problem.

"You still have to be strong, if you have strength, you don't care about these problems!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The years passed.

The following period of time was rather chaotic, because the top overlord-level forces such as the Lord of Chaos, True Dragon Cave Heaven, and Xishan occupied the territory of the Fifty Percent Territory Boundary Seam, which caused many forces to lose their original backers.

As a result, a lot of battles broke out during this period, but they were all petty fights.

Many forces eventually took refuge in top hegemon-level forces such as the Chaos Cave and found a new backer.

And the cultivators in the territory under the command of the top hegemonic forces such as the Chaos Ruins Cave had a hard time, and they were suppressed very badly.

Their cultivation is very weak, and they can't cross the long territory and go to other places.

And some of the Terran Taixuanhai cultivators, for this matter, some blood transformation realm creatures informed Xishan, and several other bone transformation realms also talked to Ye Tian's vest blood fish master.

"Lord of the Blood Fish, why do you still let some cultivators practice in the Taixuan Sea Treasure Land?"

The Lord of the Desolation asked curiously.

"It's nothing, we don't lack the Ancient Treasure Land in Xishan now, besides, I have traded with the Endless Heavenly Ancestor before, so I just gave them the Taixuan Sea to use for the time being, is there a problem?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No problem!"

The Lord of the Desolation didn't say anything more.

After all, it's just a Taixuanhai, even if it is given, it is originally from the human race anyway, and it is not theirs, so there is no need to offend the Lord of the Bloodfish with great potential because of this small matter.

And just like that, it didn't happen.
